transcript_facts:
* The patient reports knee pain following moving boxes.
* The patient reports equal pain in both knees.
* The patient denies fever or chills.
* The patient reports pain to palpation of the right knee.
* The clinician orders Ultram 50 milligrams every six hours as needed.
* The clinician orders an autoimmune panel.
* The clinician recommends the patient take it easy.
* The clinician plans to continue Synthroid.
* The clinician orders thyroid labs.
* The clinician plans to refer the patient to physical therapy if needed.
